experience.title: Lead AI Engineer – AI Center of Excellence
bullets: Led the development and production deployment of the MAP (MasterCard Assistant Platform) AI Service, including model-serving jobs, inference endpoints, Databricks assets, and production-grade configurations.

Architected and deployed production-grade Generative AI services on AWS, supporting LLM-based inference workflows, secure model serving, and low-latency API access via EKS and event-driven orchestration.
Designed and operationalized RAG-style AI service runtimes, integrating structured and unstructured data pipelines, retrieval workflows, and model orchestration for enterprise AI use cases.
Built and hardened GenAI guardrails, including prompt protection patterns, safety filtering, and early PII/prohibited-content detection aligned with responsible AI standards.
Led end-to-end GenAIOps pipelines, covering CI/CD, environment promotion, model runtime configuration, health checks, and observability using Datadog and Splunk.
Partnered with data scientists and product teams to translate business workflows into scalable AI services, ensuring compliance, resilience, and consistent production behavior.

Improved production stability by diagnosing and resolving systemic failures across EKS workloads, service bindings, schema evolution, and environment-specific configuration, resulting in sustained “green” deployments.
Acted as technical lead for AI platform architecture, influencing engineering standards, deployment patterns, and runtime best practices across multiple teams.
Optimized EKS deployments for MAP by improving workload readiness, health-check reliability, configuration accuracy, and container lifecycle behaviours.
Strengthened environment and dependency management by validating versioning, runtime compatibility, and system-to-system communication for critical MAP components.

experience.title: Senior Cloud Engineer – AI/ML Enablement & AWS Cloud Platform
bullets: Led cloud engineering efforts for Mastercard’s South Africa SOIL enablement, ensuring AWS infrastructure, routing, and service configurations were production-ready to support mission-critical payment transactions.

Supported full ML lifecycle operations, including deployment, performance monitoring, drift detection, feature freshness validation, and rapid remediation of issues such as failing DAGs, container crashes, and latency bottlenecks.
Enabled secure, scalable AI platforms for regulated financial systems, ensuring high availability, low latency, and strict compliance requirements.
Collaborated with AI/ML teams to standardize MLOps patterns, deployment workflows, and operational readiness for production AI systems.

Designed and deployed ML-enabled and GenAI services on AWS (EKS, EC2, S3, IAM, VPC, Private Link), delivering secure, scalable, and compliant AI workloads supporting real-time decisioning and transactional systems.

experience.title: Senior Data Engineer – ML & Data Science Pipelines
bullets: Built full vision-processing and IoT data pipelines across AWS/GCP to develop and operationalize a model that detects insect mortality from time-separated images, using S3, Lambda, Step Functions, Airflow, Big Query, and Dataflow.
Built end-to-end Intelligent Data Processing pipelines for computer vision and IoT-based ML models, automating ingestion, feature extraction, and training dataset generation across AWS and GCP.
Designed scalable pipelines for unstructured data processing, supporting model training and inference workflows using Airflow, Step Functions, S3, BigQuery, and Dataflow.
Implemented SQL-based feature engineering pipelines in Snowflake to support ML experimentation and production deployment.

experience.title: Cloud Data Engineer, Contractor
bullets: Developed ingestion and transformation pipelines using Python, SQL, Redshift, S3, and Kafka.
Deployed cloud infrastructure with CloudFormation and automated job scheduling.
Supported data warehouses and ODS systems powering ML workloads.

experience.title: Sr Data Engineer, Contractor
bullets: Developed File Hashing to compare data and identify changes and updates to Save Computational Used by GCP Data Flow Jobs.

experience.title: Data/Analytics Engineer, Contractor
bullets: Developed an automated tool application that increased the percentage of soy harvested by 18% in 2018 and 22% in 2019 compared to 2017 by predicting optimal harvest times based on real-time weather and soil data
Built APIs using Python3 Flask, FastAPI, and an ASGI Server that substantially reduced API response time by 70% compared to traditional services and followed strict privacy standards
Helped data scientists to automate their models for efficiency and improved run time by providing more computational power to prediction models.

experience.title: API/Data Engineer, Contractor
bullets: Designed and Deployed an automated log monitoring tool used by T-Mobile in over 10 countries to measure network usage and predict the following month’s usage, information used to tailor offers and credits to customer behaviour.
Involved in POC to setup AKS (Azure Kubernetes Service) for Data Scientists.

education.degree: Master of Science, Information Systems Security
